mapper.select:
select tu.USR_ID, tu.USR_PW, tu.USR_NM, tu.USR_PN, tu.USR_AUTH from waio.tb_usr tu , waio.tb_acs_tkn ta where tu.USR_ID = ta.USR_ID
and ta.TKN = #{tkn} and ta.EXPR_TI >= now() order by ta.EXPR_TI desc limit 1

select tu.USR_ID, tu.USR_PW, tu.USR_NM, tu.USR_PN, tu.USR_AUTH from waio.tb_usr tu , waio.tb_acs_tkn ta where tu.USR_ID = ta.USR_ID
and ta.TKN = #{tkn}
select tu.USR_ID, tu.USR_PW, tu.USR_NM, tu.USR_PN, tu.USR_AUTH, tu.USR_TI from waio.tb_usr tu where tu.USR_ID = #{value}
SELECT DEFAULT_VALUE as 'value' FROM TB_WPP_TAG_CODE WHERE func_typ = 'SERVER'
